title: Fix login page authentication bypass
description: Resolve the vulnerability reported in the security audit where malformed OAuth tokens bypass the login screen.

title: Update landing page hero text
description: Change the main value proposition headline based on marketing's new Q3 copy guidelines.

title: Database index optimization
description: Add indexes to the 'orders' table on user_id and created_at to speed up dashboard loading times.

title: Draft Q3 engineering roadmap
description: Outline high-level epics and resource allocations for the upcoming quarter.

title: Fix profile picture upload bug
description: Users are getting a 500 error when uploading PNG files larger than 2MB.

title: Review team code coverage
description: Check why unit test coverage dropped below 80% after the last merge.

title: Renew AWS SSL certificates
description: Production domain certificate expires in 10 days. Ensure auto-renewal is active or manually rotate.

title: Create Figma wireframes for checkout
description: Design the new 3-step streamlined checkout process for mobile views.

title: Refactor billing controller
description: Clean up legacy nested callbacks in the Stripe integration webhook handler.

title: Set up Google Analytics 4 tracking
description: Embed the new tracking pixels on all conversion-heavy landing pages.

title: Fix dark mode contrast issues
description: Text in the sidebar is unreadable when dark mode is toggled on OLED screens.

title: Migrate database to PostgreSQL 16
description: Perform a dry-run migration in the staging environment to check for breaking syntax changes.

title: Implement multi-factor auth (MFA)
description: Add support for authenticator apps (TOTP) during user onboarding.

title: Write API documentation for `/users` endpoint
description: Document request payloads, query parameters, and error responses using Swagger/OpenAPI.

title: Optimize images in assets folder
description: Run WebP compression script on all static homepage images to improve PageSpeed score.

title: Conduct user interview #1
description: Talk with beta tester regarding the new navigation drawer layout.

title: Fix notification microservice memory leak
description: Investigate why memory usage climbs monotonically in the Redis pub/sub wrapper.

title: Patch system dependencies
description: Run npm audit fix to resolve vulnerabilities in the UI ecosystem.

title: Draft legal privacy policy updates
description: Incorporate compliance requirements for new data collection structures.

title: Set up localized error messages
description: Add Spanish and French translation bundles for standard form errors.

title: Add End-to-End Cypress tests
description: Build test coverage for critical user journeys: sign up, add to cart, and checkout.

title: Clean up stale git branches
description: Delete merged and abandoned branches older than 3 months on GitHub.

title: Configure Sentry alerts
description: Set up Slack webhooks for immediate notification on production 5xx errors.

title: Improve component accessibility (a11y)
description: Add missing aria-labels and keyboard navigation traps inside the modal dialog components.

title: Design application app icon
description: Export variants of the updated logo for iOS, Android, and web favicons.

title: Investigate invoice calculation error
description: Some users are charged a cent extra due to floating point rounding errors during tax calculations.

title: Organize virtual team building
description: Schedule a date and pick an online game/activity for the mid-year event.

title: Set up CI/CD pipeline cache
description: Configure GitHub Actions caching for node_modules to drop build run times under 3 minutes.

title: Research WebSockets vs Server-Sent Events
description: Evaluate the best realtime message delivery protocol for our live-feed features.

title: Fix overlapping text in safari
description: CSS Grid alignment issues causing headings to mash together specifically on iOS Safari.

title: Export user data for analytics
description: Generate a CSV dump of anonymized activity logs for the data science team.

title: Write post-mortem for server outage
description: Detail the root cause analysis and action items from the June 28th API degradation incident.

title: Implement search bar auto-complete
description: Add basic debounce functionality and fetch suggestions directly from the search index API.

title: Update README installation steps
description: Include Docker Compose instructions which were left out in the recent backend upgrade.

title: Audit AWS IAM roles
description: Enforce the principle of least privilege by revoking unused broad administrator permissions.

title: Create email transactional templates
description: Build responsive HTML templates for welcome emails, password resets, and order confirmations.

title: Fix cookie security flags
description: Ensure the session cookie is configured with Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite=Strict flags.

title: Upgrade Node.js version to v20
description: Transition deployment environments and local setups to the active LTS build.

title: Add load skeleton loaders
description: Replace generic spinning icons with elegant skeleton cards on list loading screens.

title: Fix memory leak on chart component
description: Unsubscribe from ResizeObserver triggers when Dashboard views are unmounted.

title: Configure automated database snapshots
description: Set up AWS RDS lifecycle rules to hold daily snapshots for up to 30 days.

title: Test app on Android 14 API 34
description: Validate push notification behavior against newer background execution limits.

title: Build dark/light mode toggle component
description: Create a reusable context provider and switch button in the navbar.

title: Handle token expiration graceful logout
description: Prompt users with a clean modal alerting them that their session has expired before throwing them back to login.

title: Implement custom validation for password strength
description: Enforce minimum 10 characters, symbols, mixed case on the frontend and api layers.

title: Optimize bundle size split chunking
description: Configure Webpack/Vite to slice heavy third-party plotting libraries into lazy loaded chunks.

title: Set up staging seed script
description: Create automated script injecting realistic fake user data into fresh preview environments.

title: Verify backup recovery restore procedures
description: Run an operational recovery simulation using a snapshot from last week to ensure 0% data corruption.
